entities.name: WHEAT
entities.description: A cereal crop studied for grain yield and pre-anthesis assimilate contribution

entities.name: BARLEY
entities.description: A cereal crop studied for grain yield and pre-anthesis assimilate contribution

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The total amount of grain produced, which can be buffered by pre-anthesis assimilates

entities.name: PRE-ANTHESIS ASSIMILATE
entities.description: Reserves of assimilate present at flowering available for translocation to grains

entities.name: GRAIN FILLING
entities.description: The developmental stage where grains accumulate dry matter

entities.name: ENVIRONMENTAL STRESSES
entities.description: External factors that can impact grain yield during the grain filling period

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: A specific environmental stress characterized by water deficiency

entities.name: WATERED
entities.description: A condition of sufficient water availability or irrigation

entities.name: IN SITU LABELLING WITH 14CO2
entities.description: A technique using carbon-14 dioxide to estimate the contribution of pre-anthesis assimilate

entities.name: DRY WEIGHT OF NON-GRAIN PARTS
entities.description: The mass of the plant excluding the grains, used as a proxy to estimate assimilate contribution

entities.name: CAMBRIDGE
entities.description: The location where irrigated wheat was studied

entities.name: NOTTINGHAM
entities.description: The location where wheat and barley crops were studied by Gallagher et al.
